title: Fake Onion Seeds Spell Disaster for Tiruppur Farmers
summary: Hundreds of acres of small onion crops failed after farmers purchased substandard seeds from a private company. Farmers demanding compensation.

title: Tiruppur Fire Crews Rush to Nilgiris Parsons Valley Blaze
summary: Fire personnel from Tiruppur joined firefighting efforts to battle the Parsons Valley forest fire that has been raging since April 15.

title: Tiruppur Apparel Exports Rise 6.4% and 5.6% in Feb-March
summary: Tiruppur apparel sector showed strong growth with exports rising 6.4% in February and 5.6% in March year-on-year despite global headwinds.

title: US Tariffs Trigger 15% Order Drop in Textile Sector
summary: Tiruppur textile industry faces significant challenges with 15% decline in export orders due to US inflation and rising tariff pressures.

title: Industry Seeks RBI Support to Reach ₹1 Lakh Crore Export Goal
summary: Tiruppur textile exporters appeal to Reserve Bank of India to ease credit and funding constraints to achieve ₹1 lakh crore export target.

title: Bar Council Elections: Counting Completed in Tiruppur
summary: Bar Council elections were held in Tiruppur with counting process now complete, determining new council leadership for legal fraternity.

title: TNSTC Runs Special Post-Election Buses from Trichy Region
summary: TNSTC operated special buses from Trichy region to handle increased passenger movement following election day activities.

title: Legendary Photographer Raghu Rai Passes Away at Age 83
summary: Renowned photographer Raghu Rai, known for capturing India's defining moments, passed away at the age of 83.

title: Madurai Chithirai Festival Day 8: Meenakshi Pattabhishegam Ceremony
summary: Madurai's annual Chithirai festival reached its eighth day featuring the significant Meenakshi Pattabhishegam procession and rituals.

title: Heavy Rainfall Expected from April 30 to Relieve Heatwave
summary: IMD forecasts heavy rainfall likely from April 30, bringing much-needed relief from the ongoing heatwave across Tiruppur.
